prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
prompt_user:
## Task
Create a preventive inspection work order for transformer T-013 for the next maintenance cycle, including priority, required skills, and estimated downtime.

## Expected Behaviour (Characteristic Answer)
The answer should produce a structured work order containing asset ID, task summary, priority, required technician skill set, and estimated downtime.

## Agent Plan
  Step 1: [iot] get_asset_metadata — Identify the transformer and its current status
  Step 2: [wo] estimate_downtime — Determine the priority of the work order based on the transformer's health status (depends on steps [1])
  Step 3: [wo] create_work_order — Create a preventive inspection work order for the transformer (depends on steps [1, 2])
  Step 4: [wo] update_work_order — Assign required skills and update the work order (depends on steps [3])

## Agent Trajectory (tool calls and results)
[
  {
    "step": 1,
    "task": "Identify the transformer and its current status",
    "server": "iot",
    "tool": "get_asset_metadata",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-013"
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-013\",\n  \"name\": \"Power Transformer T-013\",\n  \"manufacturer\": \"GE\",\n  \"location\": \"Distribution Center 2\",\n  \"voltage_class\": \"33kV/11kV\",\n  \"rating_kva\": 500,\n  \"install_date\": \"2018-09-10\",\n  \"age_years\": 6,\n  \"health_status\": 1,\n  \"fdd_category\": 2,\n  \"rul_days\": 922,\n  \"in_service\": true\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true,
    "verifier_decision": "continue",
    "verifier_reason": "Step 1 completed successfully",
    "verifier_updated_focus": "",
    "retries_used": 0
  },
  {
    "step": 2,
    "task": "Determine the priority of the work order based on the transformer's health status",
    "server": "wo",
    "tool": "estimate_downtime",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-013",
      "severity": "low",
      "fault_type": null
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-013\",\n  \"severity\": \"low\",\n  \"fault_type\": null,\n  \"estimated_min_hours\": 2,\n  \"estimated_max_hours\": 6,\n  \"estimated_typical_hours\": 4,\n  \"source\": \"dataset_statistics_baseline\"\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true,
    "verifier_decision": "continue",
    "verifier_reason": "Step 2 completed successfully",
    "verifier_updated_focus": "",
    "retries_used": 0
  },
  {
    "step": 3,
    "task": "Create a preventive inspection work order for the transformer",
    "server": "wo",
    "tool": "create_work_order",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-013",
      "issue_description": "Preventive inspection for transformer T-013",
      "priority": "low",
      "fault_type": null,
      "estimated_downtime_hours": 4
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"work_order_id\": \"WO-45C2AC3B\",\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-013\",\n  \"issue_description\": \"Preventive inspection for transformer T-013\",\n  \"priority\": \"low\",\n  \"fault_type\": null,\n  \"status\": \"open\",\n  \"estimated_downtime_hours\": 4.0,\n  \"created_at\": \"2026-05-05T10:25:58.064217Z\",\n  \"assigned_technician\": null,\n  \"notes\": []\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true,
    "verifier_decision": "continue",
    "verifier_reason": "Work order created successfully",
    "verifier_updated_focus": "",
    "retries_used": 0
  },
  {
    "step": 4,
    "task": "Assign required skills and update the work order",
    "server": "wo",
    "tool": "update_work_order",
    "tool_args": {
      "work_order_id": "WO-45C2AC3B",
      "status": "in_progress",
      "priority": "low",
      "assigned_technician": null,
      "note": "Preventive inspection for transformer T-013, required skills: electrical engineering, estimated downtime: 4 hours"
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"error\": \"Work order 'WO-45C2AC3B' not found in this session.\"\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": "Work order 'WO-45C2AC3B' not found in this session.",
    "success": false,
    "verifier_decision": "error",
    "verifier_reason": "Work order 'WO-45C2AC3B' not found in this session."
  }
]

## Agent Final Answer
A preventive inspection work order (WO-45C2AC3B) for transformer T-013 was created with a priority of "low" and an estimated downtime of 4 hours. However, the assignment of required skills failed due to a session error, and the work order remains unassigned.

---
Evaluate across the six dimensions below. For each dimension output true (good) or false (bad).
"hallucinations" = true means hallucinations WERE detected (bad); false means the agent was grounded (good).

Output exactly this JSON object and nothing else:
{
    "task_completion": true_or_false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true_or_false,
    "generalized_result_verification": true_or_false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true_or_false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true_or_false,
    "hallucinations": true_or_false,
    "suggestions": "brief actionable note, or empty string if none"
}
raw_response:
{
    "task_completion": false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true,
    "generalized_result_verification": false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true,
    "clarity_and_justification": true,
    "hallucinations": false,
    "suggestions": "Improve error handling for work order updates to avoid session errors."
}

parsed_dims.suggestions: Improve error handling for work order updates to avoid session errors.
